title: ficus ovata var. octomelifolia
intro: Ficus ovata var. octomelifolia, also known as the Indian laurel or 'Bodhi' tree, is a plant species in the family Moraceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus ovata var. octomelifolia include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ficus ovata var. octomelifolia include making a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
